hero.headline: What are the wage, overtime and meal-break rules in Maine in 2026?
hero.subhead: $14.65/hr minimum wage, CPI-indexed each January. Overtime at 1.5× over 40 hours. Meal break required after 6 consecutive hours.

secondary_cta.label: Run the EOR vs entity crossover

answer_capsule: Maine's minimum wage is $14.65 per hour in 2026, automatically indexed to CPI each January under 26 M.R.S. §664(1). Overtime kicks in at 1.5× for hours over 40 per workweek (26 M.R.S. §664(3)). After 6 consecutive hours, employees get a 30-minute break — paid only if they must stay on duty (26 M.R.S. §601). Final wages on the next regular payday or within 2 weeks of written demand.

minimum_wage.question: What is Maine's minimum wage in 2026?
minimum_wage.answer_first: Maine's minimum wage is $14.65 per hour effective 1 January 2026, set by CPI adjustment under 26 M.R.S. §664(1). It rises automatically each year.

key_facts.indexing_mechanism: CPI — Northeast Urban region, rounded to nearest nickel

overtime.question: Does Maine have its own overtime law?
overtime.answer_first: Maine overtime law under 26 M.R.S. §664(3) mirrors the FLSA: 1.5× the regular rate for all hours over 40 per workweek. No daily overtime beyond 8 hours.

meal_break.question: Is a meal break required in Maine?
meal_break.answer_first: Yes. Under 26 M.R.S. §601, employees working 6 or more consecutive hours get a 30-minute break. Unpaid unless required to remain on duty.
meal_break.paid_threshold: Unpaid when employee is duty-free; paid when employee must stay on station

final_pay.question: When must a final paycheck be paid in Maine?
final_pay.answer_first: Maine requires final wages on the next regular payday or within 2 weeks of the employee's written demand, whichever comes first, under 26 M.R.S. §626.

pay_frequency.question: How often must Maine employers pay wages?
pay_frequency.answer_first: Maine's default pay frequency is weekly under 26 M.R.S. §621. Employers may pay bi-weekly or semi-monthly only with written employee agreement.

eor_approach.question: Do you need an entity to hire in Maine?
eor_approach.answer_first: No. Teamed acts as the employer of record in Maine from day one.

faq_schema.q: What is Maine's minimum wage in 2026?
faq_schema.a: Maine's minimum wage is $14.65 per hour in 2026, automatically adjusted each January 1 to reflect CPI changes under 26 M.R.S. §664(1). The tipped minimum is $6.90/hr for employees who regularly receive at least $30/month in tips.

faq_schema.q: Does Maine have its own overtime law?
faq_schema.a: Maine overtime law under 26 M.R.S. §664(3) mirrors the federal FLSA standard: 1.5× the regular rate for all hours worked beyond 40 per workweek. Maine does not require daily overtime beyond 8 hours.

faq_schema.q: Is a meal break required in Maine?
faq_schema.a: Yes. Under 26 M.R.S. §601, employees who work 6 or more consecutive hours are entitled to a 30-minute break. The break is unpaid unless the employee is required to remain on duty, in which case it must be paid as working time.

faq_schema.q: When must a final paycheck be paid in Maine?
faq_schema.a: Under 26 M.R.S. §626, Maine employers must pay all final wages on the next regular payday, or within 2 weeks of the employee's written demand, whichever comes first.

faq_schema.q: How often must Maine employers pay wages?
faq_schema.a: Maine law under 26 M.R.S. §621 sets a default weekly pay frequency. Employers may pay less frequently only if employees agree in writing, but cannot drop below bi-weekly.

meta.title: Maine Wage, Overtime and Meal-Break Law 2026.Teamed
meta.description: Maine minimum wage is $14.65/hr in 2026, CPI-indexed annually. Overtime at 1.5x over 40 hrs/wk. 30-min meal break after 6 hrs. EOR hiring via Teamed at $599/month flat.
